CLINICAL LAB REPORT
Patient ID: P12345
Date: 2024-01-15

ONCOLOGY BIOMARKERS

Tumor Size: 3.2 cm (measured via CT scan)
Previous: 2.8 cm (2023-12-01)

CEA Level: 8.5 ng/mL
Reference Range: 0-3 ng/mL
Status: ELEVATED

EGFR Mutation Status: Positive (Exon 19 deletion)
Test Method: PCR

CA 19-9: 45 U/mL
Reference Range: 0-37 U/mL

INTERPRETATION:
Tumor shows progression with 14% increase in size.
Elevated tumor markers consistent with active disease.
EGFR mutation detected - candidate for targeted therapy.

Physician: Dr. Smith
Lab: Oncology Diagnostics Center
